title: dialypetalum × hybridum
intro: Dialypetalum × hybridum is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the crossbreeding of Dialypetalum hookerianum and Dialypetalum hookerianum var. glabratum, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties, and to treat digestive issues, including diarrhea and nausea. The herbal preparations of Dialypetalum × hybridum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or taken in capsule form to harness its medicinal benefits.
